zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucia De Cam Harding于1400年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其时，她的父亲Ralph Harding36岁，母亲Lucia de Cam30岁。她于大约1423年与Sir Richard Oswald在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1450年在她的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Ba, Chau, Coung, Cun, Cuong, Duc, Giao, Hai, Hieu, Hoa, Hoanh, Hung, Kinh Van.  Chinese Kang, Wing, Ying, Young.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 甘, see   Gan   1.
Vietnamese (Cầm): from the Chinese surname 琴, see Qin 2.

variants.name: Camm
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Cam  .
Americanized form of German   Kamm  .

variants.name: Gan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Li, Hong, Hua, Jee, Jian, Cheong, Chin, Chuan, Eng, Hui Ming, Jianmin, Jing.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 甘, meaning ‘sweet, pleasant’ in Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Gan Pan (甘盤), a high official during the reign of King Wu Ding (died 1192  BC ), in the Shang dynasty. (ii) from Gan (甘), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Shaanxi province) during the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). (iii) from Gan (甘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Luoyang in Henan province) granted to Dai, who was known as Gan Zhao Gong (甘昭公, Duke Zhao of Gan), son of King Xiang of Zhou (died 619  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 干, meaning ‘shield’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Gan Chou (干犨), an official in the state of Song (located in present-day Shangqiu in Henan province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). (ii) from the placename Gan (邗), the name of a fief (located in present-day Yangzhou in Jiangsu province) that was granted to the son of King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). When the placename was adopted as a surname, people simplified the Chinese character 邗 to 干, which has the same pronunciation. (iii) from the placename Gan Sui (干隧) (located in present-day Wuxian in Jiangsu province). (iv) from the He Gan (紇干) family, of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surname to 干 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ). (v) from the compound surname Gan-Lei (干類), said to be originally the name of an ancient state (unknown location) prior to the Xia dynasty (2070–1600 BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: English: variant of   Harding  .
Altered form of French   Hardouin  .
French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucia De Cam Harding was born in 1400, in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Ralph Harding, was 36 and her mother, Lucia de Cam, was 30. She married Sir Richard Oswald about 1423, in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1450, in her hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucia De Cam Harding est née en 1400, à Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Harding, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lucia de Cam, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Oswald environ 1423, à Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucia De Cam Harding 1400 in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Harding 36 und ihre Mutter Lucia de Cam 30. Sie hat um 1423 in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Oswald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucia De Cam Harding è nata il nel 1400 nel Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Ralph Harding, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lucia de Cam, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Oswald circa 1423, nel Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1450, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucia De Cam Hardingが1400年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Ralph Hardingは36歳，母Lucia de Camは30歳であった。約1423年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアカンブリッジでSir Richard Oswaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1450年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucia De Cam Harding(이)가 1400년 영국 그루스스터실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Harding(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucia de Cam(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 캄브리지에서 Sir Richard Oswald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucia De Cam Harding nasceu em 1400, em Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Harding, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lucia de Cam, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Oswald aproximadamente 1423, em Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1450, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucia De Cam Harding родилась в 1400 г. в местности камбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Harding было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia de Cam, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Oswald около 1423 г. в местности камбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1450 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucia De Cam Harding nació en 1400, en Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Harding, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lucia de Cam, tenía 30 años.
